description: This dashboard plots all the important metrics for GCP Cloud Load Balancer.
title: GCP Cloud Load Balancer Dashboard

660c92d2-f8d5-443b-a28c-e9be7c979d0b.description: The deployment environment for the service.
660c92d2-f8d5-443b-a28c-e9be7c979d0b.name: deployment.environment
660c92d2-f8d5-443b-a28c-e9be7c979d0b.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%loadbalancing%'

37f0184e-5f25-4a2c-a6a8-2f7bd43f79f8.name: project_id
37f0184e-5f25-4a2c-a6a8-2f7bd43f79f8.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%loadbalancing%'

5e06323c-8cd1-4ca8-b10d-6fbdd3ad22c7.description: URL Map name for the load balancer
5e06323c-8cd1-4ca8-b10d-6fbdd3ad22c7.name: url_map_name
5e06323c-8cd1-4ca8-b10d-6fbdd3ad22c7.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'url_map_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%loadbalancing%'

a7603ec8-c4c9-4607-8d04-4b9231a5a4c8.name: backend_target_name
a7603ec8-c4c9-4607-8d04-4b9231a5a4c8.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'backend_target_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%loadbalancing%'

widgets.description: Total number of requests served by the load balancer.
widgets.title: Total Request Count

widgets.description: Total bytes sent by clients to the load balancer.
widgets.title: Total Request Bytes

widgets.description: Total bytes sent by the load balancer to clients.
widgets.title: Total Response Bytes

widgets.description: Number of requests served, broken down by URL map.
widgets.title: Request Count by URL Map

widgets.description: Bytes sent by clients, grouped by backend service.
widgets.title: Request Bytes by Backend

widgets.description: Bytes sent to clients, grouped by backend service.
widgets.title: Response Bytes by Backend

widgets.description: Total latency from proxy receiving request to client ACK on last response byte.
widgets.title: Total Latency

widgets.description: Latency from proxy sending request to backend until last byte of response received.
widgets.title: Backend Latency

widgets.description: Smoothed round-trip time (RTT) for the TCP connection between client and proxy.
widgets.title: Frontend TCP RTT

widgets.description: Number of connections from the load balancer to backends.
widgets.title: Backend Connections

widgets.description: Number of requests sent from load balancer to backends.
widgets.title: Backend Request Count

widgets.description: Latency distribution for external regional proxy requests.
widgets.title: Regional Proxy Latency

widgets.description: Number of internal errors from the load balancer.
widgets.title: Internal Error Count

widgets.description: Number of external/client errors from the load balancer.
widgets.title: External Error Count

widgets.description: Current number of open TCP/SSL proxy connections.
widgets.title: Open Connections

widgets.description: Rate of new TCP/SSL proxy connections created.
widgets.title: New Connections
